# Review start input

JSON input consumed by `harness review start`.

- Schema JSON: [review.spec.schema.json](../../../../schema/inputs/review.spec.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.ReviewSpec`

## Root Shape

ReviewSpec is the JSON input consumed by `harness review start`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dimensions` | `array<ReviewDimension>` | yes | Dimensions lists the review dimensions and instructions assigned to reviewers. |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the review kind, such as delta or full. |
| `review_title` | `string` | no | ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for finalize or custom review rounds. |
| `step` | `integer` | no | Step is the tracked plan step number when the review is step-scoped. |

## Definitions

## ReviewDimension

ReviewDimension defines one named review dimension and its reviewer instructions.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `instructions` | `string` | yes | Instructions is the reviewer prompt for this dimension. |
| `name` | `string` | yes | Name is the human-readable dimension label. |

## ReviewSpec

ReviewSpec is the JSON input consumed by `harness review start`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dimensions` | `array<ReviewDimension>` | yes | Dimensions lists the review dimensions and instructions assigned to reviewers. |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the review kind, such as delta or full. |
| `review_title` | `string` | no | ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for finalize or custom review rounds. |
| `step` | `integer` | no | Step is the tracked plan step number when the review is step-scoped. |
